title: Audit: every finding type
description: One small script that triggers all seven optimization findings — RECIP, CDIV, SERDIV, POW, CSE, FUSE, FEEDBACK — each with line, cycle savings, and a concrete rewrite.
gui: Open it; the findings table fills and clicking a finding highlights its source line.

title: Critical path & the timeline
description: 3D vector normalization: a 48-cycle critical path at 16/12, dominated by dividers. The timeline shows the three divisions as long orange bars; RECIP suggests removing two.
gui: Open it and switch to the Visualizer; toggle 'Show slack'.

title: Matched .m/.sv pair: lint, codegen, co-sim
description: A hand-written nkMatlib module and its MATLAB source. The lint is clean, codegen emits an equivalent module, and co-simulation matches the golden model bit-for-bit (needs Verilator).
gui: Open the .m (the .sv loads alongside); compare with Codegen later.

title: Linter: classic delay-matching bugs
description: Two planted bugs: an operand consumed with no matching `PIPE (delay-match) and a 1-cycle valid delay across a 4-cycle multiply (valid-chain). The fix text names the exact `PIPE to add.
gui: Run the CLI command; lint findings carry file/line and the fix.

title: Ranges: overflow & near-zero divisors
description: With sig in [-3,3] and ref in [-1,1]: 'energy' overflows 16/12, 'ratio' divides by an interval crossing zero — and --recommend honestly reports the budget UNMET (no format fixes a near-zero divide). Re-run with ref=0.5:1 and it validates.
gui: CLI-first demo; the same ranges power overflow flags everywhere.

title: Design-space exploration
description: A divider+sqrt pipeline that makes the WIDTH/SCALE trade visible: latency climbs steeply with WIDTH+SCALE (DIV_LAT = W+S). Corner stimulus keeps worst-case error honest; the Pareto front shows the frontier between points.
gui: Open it, Exploration view, Run sweep, select a starred row, Adopt selected.

title: MATLAB bridge: live types, .mat browsing, validation
description: A model script + setup script + a real .mat parameter file. Snapshot captures every variable (struct fields dotted); validate compares the golden model against MATLAB's own values; the .mat browses alone with no script — it packs nested structs, int/logical/single/complex classes, and a 5000-sample signal to exercise every Workspace column.
gui: Open params.mat, press Ctrl+Shift+M, then browse the Workspace view (filter, sort, dotted cfg.* fields).
